creator: obrien@Nuxi.cs.ucdavis.edu
text:
zmtx-zmrx is a set of ZMODEM file xfer programs.  It is written
	from scratch as a replacement for rzsz.  It does not have the
	restrictions of rzsz.  Nor is it as "fancy", thus security holes
	such as rzsz's remote execution are not in zmtx-zmrx.

Fix: 

see freefall:/incoming/zmtx-zmrx-port.tgz
How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
